description.ko: 고대 우주 먼지 속에서 중력 이상 현상으로 나타나는 VOID-3를 통해 우주의 가장 어두운 곳을 탐험합니다.
description.en: An exploration into the darkest reaches of the universe where VOID-3 manifests as a gravitational anomaly amidst ancient stardust.

prompt: A cinematic, ultra-realistic wide shot of VOID-3, a monolithic dark structure floating in the deep cosmic void. Glowing indigo and violet nebula clouds swirl around it, light bending near the event horizon, hyper-detailed cosmic dust, 8k resolution, ethereal lighting, sci-fi concept art.
